items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW @sixersonsi.bsky.social 

Mike Gansey’s front office started its tenure out with a deal that breathed new life into the Sixers.

But it’s undeniable that luck played a role.

A look at the sequence of external forces that got Jaylen Brown to Philadelphia:

www.si.com/nba/76ers/on...

media.title: The Series of Lucky Events That Got Jaylen Brown to the Sixers

items.title: Hollander POTD Horace Grant. Clemson PF was drafted 10th by CHI in 87. Took starting job in 88. Super quick defender & was huge in CHI's swarming defense in the early 90s. Also played w/ORL, SEA & LAL (won 4th ring w/LA in 01). Never had huge stats but was great player.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Horace Grant. Clemson PF was drafted 10th by CHI in 87. Took starting job in 88. Super quick defender & was huge in CHI's swarming defense in the early 90s. Also played w/ORL, SEA & LAL (won 4th ring w/LA in 01). Never had huge stats but was great player.

items.title: Jaylen Brown won more games with Boston than Dave Cowens. (Cowens finished his Celtic career with two titles, one MVP and eight All-Star selections).
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
Jaylen Brown won more games with Boston than Dave Cowens. (Cowens finished his Celtic career with two titles, one MVP and eight All-Star selections).

Only 12 players have more wins in Boston than Brown. The youngest of those 12 are Paul Pierce and Larry Bird.

items.title: @americanair.bsky.social your operations were deplorable tonight.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
@americanair.bsky.social your operations were deplorable tonight. 

3 hour delay out of MIA because of a mechanical issue. Then 30 minutes.  waiting for the jetbridge at SFO. 

I used to be Concierge key. But I’m done.

When I die I want you to be a pallbearer..

Let me down one last time  💯
